description: Monthly actual proceeds after Apple commission and taxes. Ref: https://developer.apple.com/help/app-store-connect/reference/reporting/financial-report-fields

Start Date.description: Period start date based on Apple fiscal calendar (MM/DD/YYYY). Ref: https://appstoreconnect.apple.com/WebObjects/iTunesConnect.woa/wa/jumpTo?page=fiscalcalendar

End Date.description: Period end date based on Apple fiscal calendar (MM/DD/YYYY)

UPC.description: Not applicable to developers; always blank

ISRC / ISBN.description: SKU for apps; Product ID for In-App Purchases

Vendor Identifier.description: SKU for apps or Product ID for In-App Purchases

Quantity.description: Aggregated number of units sold. Positive or negative (returns)

Partner Share.description: Proceeds you receive per unit after taxes and Apple commission. Always positive

Extended Partner Share.description: Quantity × Partner Share = total actual proceeds received. Positive or negative

Partner Share Currency.description: Three-character ISO code for the currency of proceeds. Ref: https://developer.apple.com/help/app-store-connect/reference/reporting/currency-codes

Apple Identifier.description: Unique Apple ID automatically generated for your app

Title.description: Name of app or IAP Product ID

Label / Studio / Network / Developer / P.description: Not applicable to developers; always blank

Grid.description: Not applicable to developers; always blank

ISAN / Other Identifier.description: Advanced Commerce API SKU; blank for standard apps

Country of Sale.description: Two-character ISO code of App Store where purchase occurred, based on customer Apple Account

Pre-order Flag.description: P if purchase originated from pre-order; null otherwise

Promo Code.description: Promotional code if transaction was part of a promotion; blank otherwise

Customer Price.description: Price per unit billed to customer inclusive of applicable taxes

Customer Currency.description: Three-character ISO code for currency paid by customer

synced_at.description: Timestamp when Airbyte synced this record (metadata)
